cookieConsent.title: Your cookie preferences
cookieConsent.intro: ABRPOINT and its processors use trackers (cookies and similar technologies) to operate the Service, measure its audience and, where applicable, personalise your experience. In accordance with the GDPR and the CNIL guidelines, you can accept, reject or fine-tune these trackers with equivalent ease.
cookieConsent.aiProcessor: AI assistant: your questions and the retrieved excerpts are sent to an LLM provider (default OpenRouter routing to a Llama / DeepSeek / Gemini model; optionally directly to Anthropic in the EU region) to generate answers. Processors are GDPR-compliant. No data is used to train the model. National IDs are automatically masked before transmission.
cookieConsent.changeLater: You can change your preferences at any time from the "Manage my cookies" link in your profile settings or in the footer.

necessary.title: Strictly necessary cookies
necessary.desc: Required for the Service to work: authentication, security, load balancing and remembering your choices (language, theme, consent). Exempt from consent under article 82 of the French Data Protection Act.

audience.title: Audience measurement
audience.desc: Help us understand how the Service is used so we can improve it. When configured according to CNIL exemptions (anonymisation, strictly statistical purpose, no cross-referencing) they are exempt from consent; otherwise your agreement is required.

marketing.title: Personalisation and marketing
marketing.desc: Allow us to tailor content, measure the effectiveness of our communications and, where relevant, personalise recommendations. These trackers are activated only with your free, specific, informed and unambiguous consent.

contact.title: Contact us

faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Answers to common questions. If yours isn't here, contact us.

addEmployee.q: How do I add a new employee?
addEmployee.a: Go to Management → Employees → New employee. The code is generated automatically based on the Parmodemp setting configured for the company.

overtime.q: How do I configure overtime calculation?
overtime.a: In Master Data → Company, the "Hours / Month" field sets the legal standard. Per-category thresholds (executive, supervisor, operator) are tuned in Advanced Settings.

loginIssue.q: Why can't an employee sign in after creation?
loginIssue.a: Make sure the employee's email is filled in. The TenantEmailIndex is updated automatically on creation.

importExcel.q: How do I import employees from Excel?
importExcel.a: On the employee list, use the "Excel Import" button at the top right. The template accepts columns Code, Last name, First name, Email, Function, Regime, etc.

leaveCarryover.q: What happens to leave not taken by May 31?
leaveCarryover.a: Paid leave not taken by that date is automatically transferred to the Time Savings Account (CET), capped at 10 days by default. Date and ceiling are configurable in Company → Settings.

billing.q: How do I export my subscription?
billing.a: Your Stripe invoices are available from My Profile → Billing. You can also change your plan at any time from /dashboard/plan-configuration.

contract.q: How do I generate a contract for an employee?
contract.a: Go to Vault → Template Library, pick a template, click "Export for an employee" and choose the target employee.

formations.title: Software training
formations.subtitle: Sessions delivered by our expert trainers — included in the Standard and Premium plans.
formations.footer: To book a session, contact your Account Manager or write to formations@concorde-tech.fr.

intro.title: Platform onboarding
intro.desc: Comprehensive overview: navigation, key modules, first administrator actions.

payroll.title: Payroll setup & accounting exports
payroll.desc: Calculation rules, payroll book generation, DSN/SIG export.

devices.title: Time-clock & device workshop
devices.desc: Installation, ZK / Suprema terminal sync, network troubleshooting.

leaves.title: Leave & authorization module
leaves.desc: Approval workflows, balances, holidays, CET transfers, exit authorizations.

coaching.title: Tailored coaching
coaching.intro1: Are you using Concorde-work-force and want to unlock its full potential to optimize your company's management?
coaching.intro2: Whether you are a new user wanting to get a grip on the key features, or an experienced user wishing to refine specific processes, our personalized coaching hours are designed to meet your exact needs.

tailored.title: Coaching 100% tailored to your reality
tailored.body: We take your business sector, company profile and specific challenges into account to deliver coaching that is relevant and actionable.

concrete.title: Solve concrete issues
concrete.body: Stuck on a feature? Want to set up a particular workflow? Our experts walk you through the solution step by step.

key.title: Master the key features that matter to you
key.body: Focus on the parts of the software that directly impact your day-to-day and gain efficiency.

roi.title: An investment that pays off
roi.body: By optimizing your use of Concorde-work-force, you save time, reduce errors and improve overall productivity.

prep.title: Up-front preparation for maximum efficiency
prep.body: By sharing your problem and/or the features you want to explore, our expert prepares targeted, high-impact coaching.

needs.title: Express your needs
needs.body: When you order, you can detail your problem and/or the Concorde-work-force features you want guidance on.

preparation.title: Personalized preparation
preparation.body: Our Concorde-work-force expert will analyze your needs to prepare the coaching session optimally.

session.title: One-to-one interactive coaching
session.body: Get a one-hour live session where you can ask questions, share your screen and apply the expert's recommendations.

autonomy.title: Build autonomy
autonomy.body: Our goal is to make you autonomous and confident in your use of Concorde-work-force.

coaching.priceSubtitle: A tailor-made investment for an optimal mastery of your management tool.
coaching.fundingBody: This personalized coaching service is not eligible for public funding earmarked for vocational training.
coaching.ctaTitle: Ready to optimize your use of Concorde-work-force?
coaching.ctaBody: Don't wait any longer to get the personalized guidance that will save you time and boost efficiency.

pack.title: Setup Pack
pack.tagline: Save valuable time and ensure a smooth start with Concorde-work-force
pack.intro1: Are you a new Concorde-work-force user looking to migrate your existing data hassle-free? Opening a new branch and need a fast, efficient configuration?
pack.intro2: Our "Setup Pack" is the ideal solution for you!
pack.whatTitle: What is the Concorde-work-force Setup Pack?
pack.whatBody: Our team of Concorde-work-force specialists handles the initial configuration of your account, letting you fully focus on your core business. We walk you through every step to set up your Concorde-work-force environment to your specific needs.
pack.whenTitle: When should you call on our Setup Pack?

start.title: Getting started with Concorde-work-force
start.body: Simplify the import of data from your previous tool (companies, employees, etc.) and ensure a smooth transition.

branch.title: Opening a new branch
branch.body: Configure your new Concorde-work-force workspace quickly and efficiently.

expert.title: Need expert configuration
expert.body: Tap into our know-how to optimize your account from day one.

pack.includesTitle: What our Setup Pack can include
pack.includesNote: Tailored to your quote — we adapt the scope to your context.

includes.import: Import of your existing data (companies, branches, employees, contracts, leave balances)
includes.calendar: Calendar setup (public holidays, weekly rest days, collective agreements)
includes.rules: Configuration of clock-in rules, time classes and work positions
includes.users: User account creation and access rights assignment (RBAC)
includes.overtime: Setup of overtime and absence calculation rules
includes.test: End-to-end test on a sample before going live

pack.pricingBody: The pack is priced on quotation depending on the scope:
pack.ctaTitle: Ready to get started quickly with Concorde-work-force?
pack.ctaBody: Entrust us with your initial setup and focus on what matters: your business.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Our support team replies within 24 business hours (Premium: 2h guaranteed).
contact.chatValue: Floating button at the bottom right
contact.name: Your name
contact.subject: Subject

errors.sendFailed: Failed to send. Please try again later.

contact.successMessage: Your message was sent successfully. Our team will get back to you shortly.

hero.lead: Concorde Workforce is a SaaS solution that digitizes and centralizes work-time management: clocking, attendance, leave, exit authorizations, schedules, sanctions, contracts and HR reporting.
hero.leadEnd: — it prepares monthly summaries that you can export to your existing payroll software.

punch.title: Multi-channel clocking
punch.text: Biometric devices, badge readers, web and mobile clock-in — every attendance source feeds the same register, geo-tagged and time-stamped.

leave.title: Leave & exit authorizations
leave.text: Self-service requests, cascading manager approvals, balances computed in real time, and full per-employee history.

schedule.title: Schedules and shifts
schedule.text: Fine-grained modeling of time classes, work positions, public holidays and overtime rules — including night shifts and mixed regimes.

reporting.title: HR reporting
reporting.text: Attendance, absence, lateness, contract end-date and management dashboards — exportable to PDF / Excel at any time.

secure.title: Compliant & secure
secure.text: TLS 1.3 in transit, AES-256 at rest, full access traceability, GDPR compliance and sovereign hosting.

multi.title: Multi-company, multi-site
multi.text: A single deployment to run multiple legal entities, sites and branches — each with their own calendars and business rules.

vision.approachText: Every company has its own conventions: arrival tolerance, overtime calculation, paid or unpaid public holidays, night-shift meal allowance, seniority required for certain rights… Concorde models all of this via company parameters and customizable schedules — no code to write, no export to rework.
vision.tenantText: Each tenant has its own database, its own slug, and its own access scope. No data is ever shared across customers. Provisioning is automatic at signup with a 14-day free trial.

cta.title: Want to try Concorde?
cta.subtitle: 14-day free trial, no credit card required. You stay in control of your data at all times.

chat.disclaimer: Answers based on your documents. Always confirm with a lawyer.
